pi_items.verified_value: Real data - official Chinook music store sample database (not synthetic)
pi_items.source: Install script (install_libreoffice_base.sh) downloads from GitHub official source

privileged_info_summary: The create_report task uses the official Chinook music store database (real data, not synthetic) from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database. The database contains verified record counts: 275 artists, 347 albums, 3503 tracks, 59 customers, and 412 invoices. The task requires creating a report based on the Artist table with fields ArtistId (INTEGER PRIMARY KEY) and Name (NVARCHAR(120)) in tabular layout with landscape orientation. The database is stored in SQLite format and converted to LibreOffice Base HSQLDB embedded ODB format during environment setup without any data modification.
